summary: DevOps foundation delivered for Iteration 1. GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline implemented with automated code quality gates (dart analyze, flutter test) running on every push and PR. APK build job ready for version tag releases. Full deployment documentation completed. Secrets configuration guide and Firebase config injection instructions provided. All artifacts in place.

qualityGates.name: required_artifacts_present
qualityGates.notes: .github/workflows/ci.yml, docs/DEPLOY.md, docs/handoffs/devops.md all created and committed.

qualityGates.name: ci_checks_passed_or_accepted
qualityGates.notes: CI YAML syntax valid. dart analyze + flutter test gates configured. Pipeline will run on first push to origin.

qualityGates.name: security_checks
qualityGates.notes: No secrets committed. Firebase config files injected via base64-encoded GitHub Actions secrets. .env never committed — injected at CI runtime. google-services.json in .gitignore.
